§6Liquidator Medal§f is a tribute item honoring nuclear cleanup workers.

§eReference:§f
Named after the "Liquidators" who cleaned up the Chernobyl disaster.

§eObtaining:§f
• Special achievements or crafting
• Recognition for nuclear work

§aTip:§f A commemorative item acknowledging the dangers of nuclear work.
